roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:RULING ON PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:THE MOTION TOSUPPRESS IS GRANTED/X:THE PEOPLE SUFFER A FIRST DISMISSAL, BUT COUNSEL STIPULATE TO AN IMMEDIATE REARRAIGNMENT ON THE SAME COMPLAINT AND CHARGES PURSUANT TO 1387,2PC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:10-02-19/987,2/OR/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/WIT SWORN:ERIC REBOLI, SFPD/EXHMA:PEO 1) PHOTOS/EXHMA:PEO 2) DOCUMENT/ARG&SUB/CONTD:RULING ON PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/DOP/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/LD:09-18-19/OR/X:AS ACONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP//X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:09-18-19/987,2/BAIL:25,000/SAORD/SA2:INTERSECTION OF 16TH ST AT HOFF ST, EXCEPT ON BOARD PASSING BARTTRAIN/SAORD/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
